name: Truth in Delusion
descriptionTemplate: [{Devour}: The next Command Card played this turn has its Arithmetica Cost -2.] Gain [Power:Arg1] {STR}. This turn, the Final DMG, Shield, and Healing from other Awakeners' Exalts +[Arg2]%. {Discover} 3 Skills of the deployed Awakeners with {Painted Orisons}, choose 1 to add to your hand and grant it {Exhaust} and {Retain}.
